steps.title: Review the latest shared UI convergence surface
instructions: Use docs/ui-consolidation/scan-latest.md as the current shared backlog.
Prefer migrating to existing shared templates before inventing a new abstraction.
Keep follow-up migrations inside the owning feature docs once the work stops being cross-feature.

steps.title: Review the latest performance baseline outputs before optimization work
instructions: Use docs/metrics/critical-path-performance-latest.md and docs/metrics/critical-flow-tests-latest.md as the default review surfaces.
Treat docs/metrics/route-hotspots.md as the next-level investigation when baseline output suggests route-level regressions.
Use the weekly lane only when you need trend context, not for every local improvement pass.

steps.title: Review testing quality drift before changing validation scope
instructions: Use docs/metrics/testing-suite-inventory-latest.md to confirm lane and suite ownership.
Use docs/metrics/testing-quality-snapshot-latest.md to identify inventory, quality, or ledger follow-up work.
Escalate to canonical lanes from docs/runbooks/testing-operations.md when a broad validation pass is required.

steps.title: Review baseline results and decide follow-up validation
instructions: Use the lint and typecheck outputs to decide whether a wider repo quality sweep is needed.
Escalate to bazel:smoke or bazel:ci only when the baseline checks indicate broader instability.
